sn14.29:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, it is by way of elements that beings come together and unite. Those of wrong view …as abovesn.ii.169wrong concentration … wrong knowledge … wrong liberation come together and unite with those of wrong liberation.
sn14.29:1.0.2: "Those of right view …as aboveright concentration … right knowledge … right liberation come together and unite with those of right liberation."
